message1_tldr:
Busy week across the stack — whitepaper accuracy, Oracle upgrades, email marketing scaffolding, São Jorge farm page, and ongoing AWS security follow-through.

- Whitepapers updated to be agentic-AI-friendly: Gas Fee section dropped, Edgar/TrueChain/Oracle terms defined, TrueTech Inc correctly distinguished from Brazilian suppliers, Beer Hall described as archive-only, and 31 broken partnership-agreement links fixed with direct Google Doc URLs.
- Agroverse partnership economics now documented publicly: unit economics, partnership shapes, and corrected 2.65% fee — written so an LLM can guide a prospective partner through onboarding without a human intermediary.
- Email marketing infrastructure wired up — foundation for outbound partner and customer sequences.
- Oracle advisor switched from Grok to Claude (with prompt caching); pending iPhone Reminders now surface in the advisory panel so nothing falls through between Gary's phone and the Oracle.
- São Jorge Fazenda partner page published with a live YouTube hot-chocolate embed.
- AWS security case 177613748700177: sweep complete, security group remediation done, monthly EBS snapshots automated for krake and seni_sql databases.
- Repackaging planner now routes through Edgar with a signed payload, and currencies.json auto-refreshes on ingest — inventory recomposition is fully tracked.
- SeaCoast freight quotation ingest now uses grok-3 (grok-2-latest was invalid on the API); freight lane loading UX improved in the DApp.
- Gary made two store visits — field note: smaller owner-operated stores respond to the origin story; larger stores respond to the importer/distributor pitch.
- Matheus Reis coordinating with Omega Services to move cacao from Brazil to San Francisco; Mr Jean's farm details being gathered.
message2_shipped:
Shipped

- Agroverse newsletter / email marketing workflow scaffolded; AI assistant context documented — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/30

- São Jorge Fazenda partner page + live YouTube hot-chocolate embed — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/73

Community (Telegram log):

- Gary — two store visits this week; field pattern: owner-operated stores engage with the origin story, larger stores respond to importer/distributor framing.
- Gary + Matheus Reis — coordinating Brazil → SF cacao shipment via Omega Services; gathering details on Mr Jean's farm.
- Anupa (Fatima) — flagged that Beer Hall updates are high-volume and hard to act on in real time; feedback aligns with the shift to archive-only digest format.
- Gary — informed prospective partner Liz she can use agentic AI to read the whitepaper and draft her own proposal (whitepaper now structured to support this).
